name: Applesauce Mint Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the dry ingredients and chopped nuts.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the egg, applesauce, mint (either dried or fresh), and oil until just blended.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Grease a loaf pan and pour in the batter.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack.
7. Once completely cooled, wrap the bread in plastic wrap or foil.
